title: OpenRouter Fusion: They OFFICIALLY CLAIM THAT THIS MODEL beats FABLE?
summary: AICodeKing reviews OpenRouter Fusion, a new API that combines multiple models in parallel with a judge model to select outputs. While OpenRouter claims Fable-level performance at half the cost, the reviewer finds the marketing misleading and shows that Fusion underperforms on practical tasks like coding, math, and SVG generation compared to using single strong models directly.
writeup: AICodeKing reviews OpenRouter's Fusion API, which runs parallel model calls and uses a judge model to select outputs, with an official claim of Fable-level performance at half the cost. The review tests the system across physics-style simulators, SVG generation, math, and coding tasks. Results come back inconsistent and worse than single strong models, leading to the conclusion that the marketing claims are misleading and the system is overhyped. The takeaway: the parallel-call plus judge approach does not deliver the promised quality or cost advantage in these tests.
